channel.title: Build is failing and getting error around `className` as an invalid prop
channel.description:
I am presently using frontity to build tutubi.app for a few months now. Out of the blue, a warning around className not being a prop appeared, and also, the view doesn't rebuild. Need suggestions on how to fix this.
The error **Prop `className` did not match. Server:**
Please advise on how to go about fixing this.
Warm regards, Himadhar H

item.title: Build is failing and getting error around `className` as an invalid prop
item.dc:creator: himadhar
item.description:
Deleting node_modules, package.json file etc resolved rebuilding issue. But the warning needs to be fixed.

Read full topic
item.source: Build is failing and getting error around `className` as an invalid prop

item.title: Build is failing and getting error around `className` as an invalid prop

item.description:
I am presently using frontity to build tutubi.app for a few months now. Out of the blue, a warning around className not being a prop appeared, and also, the view doesn’t rebuild. Need suggestions on how to fix this.

The error Prop className did not match. Server:

Please advise on how to go about fixing this.

Warm regards,
Himadhar H
